page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ae.32xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T34 processors running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, offering consistent performance for CPU-bound workloads.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-frequency AMD EPYC processors, the ecs.c8ae.32xlarge is designed for high-compute workloads. It is highly suitable for tasks such as intensive batch processing, high-performance computing, scientific modeling, and large-scale build systems.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ae.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs and 128 physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T34 processors running at 3.4 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this server provides 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage for data persistence. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps, ensuring high-throughput connectivity. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high core count, the ecs.c8ae.32xlarge is engineered for compute-intensive workloads, including high-performance computing, batch processing, and large-scale compilation tasks.
